Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Seshethkunaaz]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Seshethkunaaz is the Monarch of Dragons.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Seshethkunaaz is the wandering King of Dragons and appears as a cloaked human boy with golden eyes.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Seshethkunaaz is the King of Dragons and Monarch of the eastern Ashwind continent.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Seshethkunaaz is the King of Dragons and appears as a boy of approximately thirteen years old with sandy hair and bright gold eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Seshethkunaaz smiles like a serpent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Seshethkunaaz is a character Lindon fears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Seshethkunaaz is a Monarch and an ancestor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Seshethkunaaz was lounging against a pillar in the audience chamber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Reigan Shen sent a message to Seshethkunaaz through vital aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Seshethkunaaz whispered to Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Seshethkunaaz can rise on a cloud of golden sand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Seshethkunaaz died, which was felt by Northstrider from a hundred miles away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Seshethkunaaz was a dragon and a Monarch that did not become a Remnant due to Penance.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Seshethkunaaz is the King of East Ashwind and a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Seshethkunaaz is a Monarch who pooled supplies left behind after the Dread War.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Seshethkunaaz is the King of Dragons and a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Seshethkunaaz is the Dragon of the Wasteland.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Seshethkunaaz is a person from whom Yan Shoumei received an Ancient Scale.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
